infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TabTrack uses your location to detect when you've left home and might be on a trip.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TabTrack uses your location in the background to detect trip start automatically.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: TabTrack uses your contacts so you can quickly add friends to a trip.
